mapper.select: select GOOD from customer_act where customer_id=#{custId} and product_id=#{prodId} and GOOD='Y'
insert into customer_act(customer_id,product_id,GOOD) values(#{custId},#{prodId},'Y') on duplicate key update good = 'Y'

SELECT p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, ic.image_url FROM insurance_product p JOIN insurance_company ic ON p.company_id = ic.id
WHERE p.id IN ( SELECT product_id FROM customer_act WHERE customer_id = #{cust_id} AND good = 'Y' ) LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_act WHERE customer_id = #{custId} AND good = 'Y'
